DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joshua S. Goodman, esq. (415-705-0403) of Goodman Neuman Hamilton LLP for Plaintiff/Opposing party Irving Zaretsky.
Lisa L. Pan, esq. (415-949-1900) of Demler, Armstrong & Rowland, LLP for Defendants/Moving party MARK CASEY and CARRIE CASEY.

The Court announces its tentative ruling. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS MARK CASEY and CARRIE CASEY'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is OVERRULED. This action is not subject to CCP 583.310 at this time and is not uncertain. Moving party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Oct-27-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Joshua S. Goodman, esq. (415-705-0403) of Goodman Neuman Hamilton LLP for Plaintiff/Opposing party Irving Zaretsky.
Lisa L. Pan, esq. (415-949-1900) of Demler, Armstrong & Rowland, LLP for Defendants/Moving party MARK CASEY and CARRIE CASEY.

The Court announces its tentative ruling. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANTS MARK CASEY and CARRIE CASEY'S MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT is GRANTED with leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege facts re: basis for recovery of investigative costs and attorney's fees. Moving party to submit order in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b). Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: S. Le, Not Reported. (D501)
